# services.mympd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mympd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mympd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable MyMPD server. |
| `services.mympd.extraGroups` | `list of string` | Additional groups for the systemd service. |
| `services.mympd.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports needed for the functionality of the program. |
| `services.mympd.package` | `package` | The mympd package to use. |
| `services.mympd.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (null or string or boolean or signed integer)` | Manages the configuration files declaratively. For all the configuration options, see <https://jcorporation.github.io/myMPD/020-configuration/configuration-files>. Each key represents the "File" column from the upstream configuration table, and the value is the content of that file. |
| `services.mympd.settings.http_port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The HTTP port where mympd's web interface will be available. The HTTPS/SSL port can be configured via {option}`config`. |
| `services.mympd.settings.ssl` | `boolean` | Whether to enable listening on the SSL port. Refer to <https://jcorporation.github.io/myMPD/020-configuration/configuration-files#ssl-options> for more information. |
